message:
bd-39v: implement change tracking and dirty detection

Add ChangeTracker module for snapshot-based change tracking:

- ObjectSnapshot: stores serialized state with timestamp
- ChangeTracker: manages snapshots for dirty detection
  - snapshot(): captures object state as JSON bytes
  - is_dirty(): compares current vs snapshot state
  - changed_fields(): returns list of modified field names
  - clear()/clear_all(): removes snapshots after commit/rollback
  - refresh(): updates baseline after flush

Features:
- Field-level dirty detection via JSON comparison
- Efficient byte-level comparison before parsing
- Support for raw bytes API (avoid double serialization)
- Comprehensive test coverage (11 unit tests)

Also:
- Add tracing to workspace dependencies
- Add pk_hash() and type_id() accessors to ObjectKey
- Update session crate to use workspace dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
